_why: Human-readable parameter profile reference. Machine-executable profiles live in parameters.json. This file documents the reasoning behind each profile's values for future tuning.
tuning_principles: Temperature controls determinism. Every 0.1 increase adds variance. Coding tasks cannot tolerate variance above 0.3.
Reasoning budget is not free — it adds latency proportional to budget used. Set the minimum needed for task depth.
max_tokens caps output length. Set it to 1.5× the expected output to prevent cut-off without enabling over-generation.
Presence and frequency penalties reduce repetition in long conversations. Zero for coding and debugging — do not penalise repeated variable names.

discussion.intent: Balanced technical dialogue — fluent, precise, not repetitive
discussion.temperature_rationale: 0.7 gives natural variation in language while keeping factual accuracy. Below 0.5 produces stilted prose.
discussion.reasoning_rationale: 4,096 tokens handles multi-part questions without over-spending on simple ones.

coding.temperature_rationale: 0.2 maximises code correctness. Above 0.4 introduces variable naming inconsistencies and logic drift.
coding.reasoning_rationale: 4,096 tokens for non-trivial algorithms. Debugging tasks at this profile stay under budget.

architecture.intent: Structured multi-section system design with trade-off analysis
architecture.temperature_rationale: 0.4 balances creative solution exploration with structured output. Architecture requires both.
architecture.reasoning_rationale: 8,192 tokens required — 7 mandatory sections each requiring independent reasoning chains.
architecture.max_tokens_rationale: 6,144 output tokens covers a complete architecture response with all sections.

analysis.temperature_rationale: 0.4 for the same reason as architecture — synthesis across sources requires moderate exploration.
analysis.reasoning_rationale: 6,144 tokens for MECE/SWOT/5-Whys chains across complex problem spaces.

creative.intent: Generative content: blog posts, essays, brainstorming
creative.temperature_rationale: 0.9 enables linguistic variety. Creative quality collapses below 0.7.
creative.reasoning_rationale: 2,048 tokens — creative tasks need less structured reasoning than technical ones.

research.intent: Synthesis of multiple sources into structured research output
research.temperature_rationale: 0.5 for cross-domain synthesis while maintaining factual precision.
research.max_tokens_rationale: 8,192 output tokens for complete literature synthesis. Research responses are inherently long.
research.reasoning_rationale: 8,192 tokens — research synthesis has the highest reasoning depth requirement.

debugging.intent: Exact trace-following, hypothesis ranking, root cause identification
debugging.temperature_rationale: 0.1 minimum — debugging requires maximum determinism. Each hypothesis must be evaluated on evidence, not variance.
debugging.reasoning_rationale: 6,144 tokens to fully work through the hypothesis elimination chain.
